serviceAreas.description: We proudly serve Wickenburg and the surrounding area. For projects beyond 50 miles, give us a call to arrange travel costs. No job is too big or too small.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Your trusted partner for repairs and construction in Wickenburg

story.title: Our Story
story.paragraph1: With over 20 years of experience, Gato Montes Construction has been part of the Wickenburg community as neighbors and friends, not just contractors. We specialize in bathroom remodeling, flooring and tile repair, door and window installation, stucco and fence repair, drywall, painting, and many more services.
story.paragraph2: We understand the challenges of maintaining a property in the Arizona desert and offer lasting solutions at fair, honest prices. We serve Wickenburg and the surrounding area, and we're happy to travel beyond 50 miles by prior arrangement.
